interface.shortDescription: Self-hosted Codex CLI marketplace for double-wechat.
interface.longDescription: Provides a Codex CLI plugin (double-wechat) that lets the user manage multiple WeChat instances on macOS via natural language — list / create / start / delete / update copies of WeChat.app. All operations run as the current user (no sudo required when in admin group). Backed by a local double-wechat shell binary.

plugins.name: double-wechat
plugins.description: Manage multiple WeChat instances on macOS via natural language. SKILL.md routes natural language to the local double-wechat binary (list/create/start/delete/update/doctor).
